name: 13q12_11_CRYL1_SD
description: 13q12.11 pericentromeric segmental-duplication block immediately distal to the chr13 centromere, harbouring the CRYL1, GJB2/GJB6 connexin-cluster proximal flank, and STARD13 region. Contains pericentromeric-transition SDs (PTSDs) that are mosaic with chr21q11-q12 and contributed to the lineage-specific seeding of new gene families in great-ape pericentromeres.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic 5-100 kb SD modules at 92-99% identity shared with chr21 pericentromere and chr2 pericentromere; punctuated by transposon-rich unique segments.
